scenes.title: The Sanctum
scenes.biggestGap: The opening already has texture, but the seminar can still lean on generic room language unless the sanctum's materials keep interrupting the theorem.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Kel'Thuzad's sanctum is a working office under Scholomance, cold and salted against the damp off Darrowmere.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Chalk dust, slate, specimen glass, desk wood, and the sanctum door must keep the mechanism physical.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina reads Antonidas's notation everywhere and tracks the carrier-host problem through mage training, not awe.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Pin the opening exchange to board-work, Jandice at the latch, chalk in hand, and Jaina's contact with the table.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The individualized folio on preserved selfhood must carry the scene out of generic theory and into personal intent.

scenes.title: The Duel
scenes.biggestGap: The ethics exchange can start floating as pure quotation unless the room keeps intruding through wood, jars, chalk, and ward hum.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Keep the argument trapped inside one ordinary working sanctum rather than letting it become abstract courtroom space.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Cold table edge, chalk grit, specimen jars, shelf wood, and flagstone should punctuate the longest runs.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina keeps forcing the theorem back to kitchens, graves, bodies, and consent because that is where the real violation lives.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Set the ethics duel against page turns, hand placement, and the room's offensive banality.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The shelf with Antonidas-shaped notation and crossed-out marks should leave the scene pointed toward the personal wound.

scenes.title: The Mirror
scenes.biggestGap: Jaina's recognition and recoil can drift abstract unless her body, the desk, and the copied pages stay present on the page.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: The same sanctum must feel worse because it stays ordinary while Jaina's understanding changes inside it.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Chair scrape, desk edge, copied pages, and ward-thrum under stone anchor the comprehension shock.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina experiences the wound as her own mind outrunning judgment for one beat and then recoiling from itself.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: The Antonidas exchange needs physical proof-work and the visible residue of shared schooling.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Jaina's copied pages beside Kel'Thuzad's work must carry the contamination of recognition into the next scene.

scenes.title: The Revelation
scenes.biggestGap: The Lich King and Burning Legion disclosures can widen out of the room unless every named answer stays tied to folios, diagrams, and Jaina's road-bound thinking.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Cosmic scale must still arrive from one folio on one desk in a sanctum under Caer Darrow.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Folio texture, runic chains, table edge grip, shelf wood, and fungal light keep the scale embodied.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina immediately translates each revelation into logistics, roads, grain, and which institutions will fail to move in time.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Every namedrop needs tactile counterweight: fingertip on the diagram, nails on table, or crossing to the shelves.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The personal recurrence model should narrow the frame back from world-scale war to one prepared self.

scenes.title: The Silence and the Sound
scenes.biggestGap: The ending already carries pressure, but the wards and approach beats still lean on generic floor-stair-door language that can be made more Scholomance-specific without slowing the breach.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Use the crypt spine and layered ward architecture of Scholomance as the approach map.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Chalk on cloth, flagstone pulses, ward-lines, and the sanctum door must carry the scene.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina recognizes Sylvanas through movement quality and tactical cadence before she lets herself reach for relief.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Kel'Thuzad's last questions should play against Jaina's visible recognition and the room's changing ward response.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Leave a misread-ready tableau: chalked hands, moved chair, calm necromancer, and the next ward answering above.
